creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
Created attachment 229841
Update to 11.5.3

This version is a maintenance release and contains bug fixes only.

TYPO3 v11.5.3 now provides compatibility with PHP 8.1, which is scheduled to be released end of November 2021.


For details about the release, please see:

https://get.typo3.org/release-notes/11.5.3
https://typo3.org/article/typo3-1153-maintenance-release-published
